transcript: Scanned source and previewed metadata plus label carrier interpretation.
Mapped generic events.tsv to the second EEG file in the wizard.
Reviewed label column, anchor, time model, granularity, and role.
Confirmed trial_type as the class cue event role.
Validation required confirmation for missing metadata.
Confirmed apply loaded the interpreted source.

scan_source.message: Scanned source and found 2 EEG file(s).

warnings: Multiple EEG files were discovered; subject/session/run mapping should be reviewed.
External label/event carriers require preview before apply.

geometry.boundary: Automated replay geometry checks table/tree header width, viewport fill, horizontal scrollbar state, optional content-boundary gap, and clipped visible rows. It is not a substitute for human UI review.

visible_text.boundary: Checks user-visible replay text for selected raw command names and recipe trace tokens. Backend command payloads and diagnostics may still preserve raw trace values.

ui_quality_review.human_design_review_boundary: This automated replay catches obvious table/tree geometry and visible internal-token regressions. Human desktop review still decides polish, DPI, and Windows launcher acceptance.
